name: Task API Level 0 Surface Assertions
description: Confirms that the published task API endpoints exist and respond to minimally valid requests.
author: Mike Amundsen

tests.name: Home endpoint exists
tests.description: Confirms the API entry point responds.

tests.name: Task collection endpoint exists
tests.description: Confirms the task collection endpoint responds.

tests.name: Task item endpoint exists
tests.description: Confirms a known task resource endpoint responds.

tests.name: Create task endpoint exists
tests.description: Confirms the task creation endpoint accepts a minimally valid request.

tests.name: Edit task endpoint exists
tests.description: Confirms the task edit endpoint responds to a minimally valid update.

tests.name: Update task status endpoint exists
tests.description: Confirms the task status endpoint responds to a minimally valid request.

tests.name: Assign task endpoint exists
tests.description: Confirms the task assignment endpoint responds to a minimally valid request.

tests.name: Set task due date endpoint exists
tests.description: Confirms the task due-date endpoint responds to a minimally valid request.
